_comment: Read-only mirror of The System — Nexus Patch Feed. The Notion Patch Feed is the source of truth; this file is the app-only call-home, regenerated by /broadcast on each patch. Do not hand-edit.

patches.title: v1.0.0 — Gate Protocol goes live
patches.player_facing_summary: The System becomes multiplayer-distributable: the Seed, /awaken, /petition, /party, the Patch Feed itself, and the Sigil Check. Existing instances keep their history untouched; new features are usable from today.

patches.title: v1.0.1 — Codex copy: "Story Bank" naming unified
patches.player_facing_summary: Copy-only patch: the XP table line "Story added to Skill Inventory" now reads "Story added to Story Bank" everywhere, matching the database's display name. No XP values, rules, or schemas change.

patches.title: v1.0.2 — Maintenance window (schedule-setup fix incoming)
patches.player_facing_summary: The System is briefly in maintenance while we fix an issue with automated schedule setup during /awaken. Your data is untouched and commands work normally. If your daily briefing didn't switch on after you awakened, that's the known issue — a fix is coming and you'll be prompted to re-run /awaken. You may see a short maintenance note instead of an automated briefing during the window.
